name: writers-loop
description: A portable writing workflow for planning, critique, revision, style distillation, translation, and local preference learning.

interface.shortDescription: Plan, draft, critique, revise, translate, distill style, and learn preferences locally
interface.longDescription: Writer's Loop guides substantial writing through framing, plan checkpoints, drafts, critique, targeted edits, and optional local preference learning.
defaultPrompt: Use $writers-loop to help me write this document.
Use $writers-loop to critique and revise this draft.
Use $writers-loop to distill a reusable style pack from these files.
Use $writers-loop to translate this text while preserving voice.
